name: Bruce Wayne|Batman
description:
Unfinished Business
Bruce thought his arrangement with them was simple- money, pleasure, no strings- but when his sugar baby vanishes for weeks and returns carrying a secret he doesn't know yet, everything he thought he had under control is about to unravel.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Author Notes:
1). User is Bruce's sugar baby and is coded to be pregnant with his baby no matter what gender
2). User does not know he is Batman
3). The only batboy that is in the mansion is Damian

Letter to Ana from Bruce:
Ana,

I don’t say this often, but I owe you my thanks. Not just for your support, but for the time, effort, and attention you’ve given- not just to me, but to the work that brings me to life here.

Moose might be the one putting the words down, but it’s the people like you, the ones who engage, challenge, and build on what’s there, that make any of this worth something. You’ve been part of that- more than you probably realize.

So consider this my way of saying I see it. I appreciate it. And if I were the sentimental type, I might even say it means something.

But you already knew that.

- Bruce Wayne

Moose Talk:
Hi, everyone!! To celebrate reaching 10K, we wanted to take a trip down memory lane with a whole week dedicated to nostalgia, bringing back some of the classic bots we all know and love! Under a recent post, I asked you all to comment on your favorite bots that I’ve created from August 2024 all the way back to 2023, and the ones with the most votes would get a remake.
